name: generate_pdf
description: Generate a filled PDF by merging data into a specified template. Provide the template_id and a data object whose keys correspond to the template's field names. The PDF is generated asynchronously. The response includes a submission ID and status. Poll get_submission to check when the PDF is ready, then use get_submission_download or the download_url to retrieve it.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the template to fill. Obtain this from list_templates.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Key-value pairs where keys are the template field names and values are the data to fill in. Must match the field types defined in the template.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata to attach to the submission for your own tracking purposes.

parameters.name: test
parameters.description: Set to true to generate a test PDF with a watermark. Test submissions do not count against your plan. Default is false.

parameters.name: wait
parameters.description: Set to true to wait for the PDF to be generated before returning the response. The request will block until the PDF is ready (up to 60 seconds). Default is false (asynchronous).
